name: Lemon Grass Seafood Combination- Pad Po Taek
recipeIngredient: 1 Stalk Lemon Grass, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large skillet and add the oil.
2. Add all the seafood and sauté for 2 minutes on high heat.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and gently combine.
4. Cover the pan and continue cooking for about 3 minutes.
5. Remove to a serving plate.
